_description: Synthetic Aerodrome sandwich on Base WETH/USDC pool. MEV bot front-runs victim on an Aerodrome pool (Solidly fork), which emits a Swap event with `to` as the 2nd indexed param — different ABI signature and topic0 from UniV2. Three Aerodrome Swap events: front (attacker buys WETH) + victim (buys WETH at degraded price) + back (attacker sells WETH for profit). Expected: sandwich_mev_v1 fires with confidence >= 0.55.
_source: Synthetic — constructed from Aerodrome pool mechanics (IPool.sol, aerodrome-finance/contracts, fetched 2026-04-24 via WebFetch). Aerodrome Swap event has `to` as 2nd indexed param vs UniV2 where `to` is last indexed, producing topic0 0x09e2454bf22afdad4bcc83d424195309de19932adacabef845f825baeb10baf6.
_reference: Daian et al. 2019 (Flash Boys 2.0), arXiv:1904.05234; Chi, He, Hu & Wang 2024, arXiv:2405.17944
_adr_note: ADR 0003 carve-out: synthetic fixture. No live Base RPC required. Fixture created 2026-04-24.
_fixture_note: Swap amounts use SwapRow conventions (amount_in_raw, amount_out_raw). The dex field uses 'aerodrome' to denote Aerodrome Solidly-fork pool. Profit = back.amount_out_raw - front.amount_in_raw > 0.

swaps._comment: Front-run: MEV bot buys WETH with USDC on Aerodrome pool
Victim: buys WETH at degraded price
Back-run: MEV bot sells WETH back for profit

_notes: Differs from UniV2 Swap topic0 (0xd78ad95fa46c994b6551d0da85fc275fe613ce37657fb8d5e3d130840159d822): Aerodrome has `to` as 2nd indexed param.
Pool address 0x7effd5f6654ce3d2df48b5d9cdbba2736e5b0ed9 is a well-known Aerodrome WETH/USDC pool on Base (Basescan).
Fixture uses SwapRow format (already-decoded data from swaps table), not raw ABI log bytes.
Profit: back.amount_out_raw (17780000000 USDC raw) - front.amount_in_raw (17500000000 USDC raw) = 280000000 raw = $280 at 6 decimals.
Created 2026-04-24 as synthetic fixture (no live Base RPC required).
Aerodrome Router 0xcf77a3ba9a5ca399b7c97c74d54e5b1beb874e43 is in settlement allowlist (verified 2026-04-24). Pool-level swaps (not router-level) are NOT suppressed.
